title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
plot: After the battle between the Autobots and Decepticons that leveled Chicago, humanity thinks that all alien robots are a threat. So Harold Attinger, a CIA agent, establishes a unit whose sole purpose is to hunt down all of them. But it turns out that they are aided by another alien robot who is searching for Optimus Prime. Cade Yeager, a "robotics expert", buys an old truck and upon examining it, he thinks it's a Transformer. When he powers it up, he discovers it's Optimus Prime. Later, men from the unit show up looking for Optimus. He helps Yeager and his daughter Tessa escape but are pursued by the hunter. They escape and Yeager learns from technology he took from the men that a technology magnate and defense contractor named Joshua Joyce is part of what's going on, so they go to find out what's going on.
expanded_plot: Four years after the devastating Battle of Chicago, humanity has turned against all Transformers, viewing both Autobots and Decepticons as a unified threat to Earth. This widespread fear and xenophobia are capitalized upon by Harold Attinger, a cunning and corrupt CIA agent, who establishes a clandestine black-ops unit called 'Cemetery Wind' with the explicit directive to hunt down and eliminate all alien robots. Unbeknownst to the general public, Attinger's unit is covertly aided by Lockdown, a formidable, neutral-aligned alien bounty hunter who possesses advanced alien technology and is singularly focused on capturing Optimus Prime for his own mysterious employers. Meanwhile, in rural Texas, Cade Yeager, a struggling inventor and devoted single father, scrapes by fixing electronics and machinery. He acquires an old, rundown semi-truck hoping to salvage parts, but upon closer inspection, he realizes it's an alien robot in disguise. After powering it up, Cade discovers the truck is none other than Optimus Prime, gravely injured and in hiding. Their secret is short-lived when Attinger's unit, led by the ruthless James Savoy, raids Cade's farm, having tracked Optimus. Optimus Prime, regaining some strength, helps Cade and his defiant daughter, Tessa, escape the deadly assault. They are relentlessly pursued by Lockdown and Cemetery Wind, who prove to be formidable adversaries. During their desperate escape, Cade manages to retrieve advanced technology from one of Attinger's agents. Hacking into it, he uncovers alarming information: a powerful and ambitious technology magnate and defense contractor named Joshua Joyce, CEO of Kinetic Solutions Incorporated (KSI), is deeply involved in the anti-Transformer operations, seemingly reverse-engineering alien technology. Realizing the scale and implications of Joyce's involvement, Cade, Tessa, and Optimus set out to confront him and uncover the full truth behind humanity's new war on Transformers.

omdb_payload.Title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
omdb_payload.Actors: Mark Wahlberg, Nicola Peltz Beckham, Jack Reynor
